text.title: venice, italy
text.u: I feel like he's here it's an Italian
fluffy cat with the fiddle these cats
cute a little smushy face it's on my
bucket list to have one but I already
like I can't get one now you know what I
mean I've already I already have two I
think once you have more than two cats
I'm always keeping my eye out for places
that have like non-dairy milk and
kind of hard to find in Italy this is
one Milky Place milk in the pasta milk
in the gelato milk in the coffee when
they give you ice cubes they're milk
like I could [ __ ] take a block of
eat eat the whole block I'm on first
name basis with Parmesan cheese so I
I rented a boat for the day because I
was like there's no way to get around
Venice unless you have a boat
I'm [ __ ] with you that's not my boat
and actually the owner of Google
dirty look they're like don't even
but honestly that boat's kind of cringe
it's not good it's not good I've been
like deodorant just isn't cutting it I'm
at a point right now where if I were to
get into an elevator like I defend the
people the other people in the elevator
and they'd be like who's that you know I
but what's worse like farting in an
I think farting in the elevator is worse
I mean Bo's a close second also I need
to find coffee and I you would think
it'd be easy I bodied two this morning
I'm not really feeling so confident
about my third and fourth right now
because I'm really not finding anything
to Starbucks and I'm kind of in a place
right now where I'm like if I saw a
Starbucks I'd go in and that's a dark
place I don't want to be in that place
we need to get me out of that place fast
in this city they're everywhere those
[ __ ] crazy no coffee yet like I'm not
finding a coffee shop I need to sit
chill and vibe in a coffee shop right
coffee store not a coffee shop
what's up they give you a bunch of
little goodies when you get a coffee
that is the same as the other one yeah
oh yeah that was really good let's do a
these are interesting I am curious to
see how I'm gonna style them I have an
idea when in Italy Versace I had to get
this I had to it was not my fault
do you know what I mean do you know what
I did something it's like this bag's big
sister I am also obsessed with a
you can you know oh okay hi no that's my
oh I mean it's not that bad
I have Harry Styles stuck in my head was
listening to it in the shower
I will be honest I was singing I feel
like that song was made for me like I
he doesn't fight with me I fight with
him is it true that if you spray uh
hairspray in your armpits you won't
I've never heard that I haven't either
I get a tonsil stone for every single I
have stress it's stress do you think so
yes I get a [ __ ] time I had a tonsil

know because I'm always looking for a

don't ever spray perfume in your armpits

but you won't hear me whining about it
the second we're out of this room it's
